subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-01-25
subcodes.first_line: In the world of genesis every power or energy has a focal center. For example the center of intelligence is the brain. The center of vision is the eye.
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual transformation, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
